transcript:
CALLER: Hello, umm, I have a mediclaim policy through my company — it's United India Insurance. Does your hospital accept it?
AGENT: Good afternoon! Yes, Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic is empanelled with United India Insurance. We process both cashless and reimbursement claims for their corporate policies.
CALLER: Oh good. My policy has a sub-limit on room rent. Will that be a problem?
AGENT: It can affect your final settlement if the room you choose exceeds the sub-limit, as proportionate deductions may apply. I'd suggest confirming your exact room rent limit from your HR or the insurer before admission, so we can assign an appropriate room.
CALLER: That makes sense. And who do I contact at the clinic for the pre-auth process?
AGENT: Our TPA coordinator, Ms. Sunita, handles all pre-authorization. You can reach the TPA desk directly at extension 204, or just walk in to the ground floor billing area. They're available 9 AM to 6 PM on weekdays.
CALLER: Wonderful, thank you very much.
AGENT: Of course! Wishing you a smooth experience. Feel free to call anytime.
